text: Expand root README into a complete local-first quickstart
description: Strengthen the top-level README so a first-time visitor can understand what Aimparency is, prerequisites, quickstart commands, the local service architecture, and the expected `.bowman` project workflow without prior context.

reflections.context: Improve the release-facing documentation so a first-time open source user can understand the local-first startup flow and how Aimparency uses .bowman directories.
reflections.outcome: Expanded the root README with a real quickstart, local project workflow, and .bowman layout section, and corrected the MCP README so it reflects the current build output and local backend assumptions.
reflections.effectiveness: Reading the actual backend normalization and project-structure code before editing kept the docs aligned with real behavior instead of repeating stale assumptions.
reflections.lesson: For release docs, verify path conventions and generated-file behavior against code first; top-level docs drift quickly when local tooling evolves.
reflections.pattern: This matches earlier cleanup work where the highest-value documentation fixes came from tightening the first-run path and removing old distribution assumptions.

status.comment: Expanded the root README into a local-first quickstart with concrete .bowman workflow and data-layout guidance, and updated the MCP README to match the actual local runtime and package build path.
